case_title: GLASSER PETER et al VS HUR CHRISTINE et al

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL TO RACHEL CHUN RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF OCT-11-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLASSER PETER MORRIS JOHN STENZEL KURT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUR CHRISTINE CHANG HELEN $765.65 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $780.65, JUDGEMENT IS IN ADDITION TO $1079.35 PREVIOUSLY PAID BY DEFT TO PLTF. FURTHER, PLTFS ARE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HUR CHRISTINE CHANG HELEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GLASSER PETER MORRIS JOHN STENZEL KURT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO CHRISTINE HUR RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $94.28 FILED BY HUR CHRISTINE CHANG HELEN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GLASSER PETER MORRIS JOHN STENZEL KURT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,909.40 FILED BY GLASSER PETER MORRIS JOHN STENZEL KURT AS TO DEFENDANT HUR CHRISTINE CHANG HELEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG HELEN
